page.title: Quick Start
page.lead: Create a server with Skyguard JS in seconds.

createFirstServer.title: Create your first server
createFirstServer.intro: If you already have <mark class="docs-highlight">NodeJS</mark> installed on your machine, these are the simple steps to start using SkyguardJS:

testServer.title: Test your server
testServer.description: Open your browser and visit <mark class="docs-highlight">http://localhost:3000/</mark> or use curl, Postman, or Insomnia:

addMoreRoutes.title: Add more routes
addMoreRoutes.description: Skyguard makes it easy to add multiple routes with different HTTP methods.

handleRequestData.title: Handle request data
handleRequestData.description: To access params, query, body, and headers from the request, use the request object passed as a parameter to the handler function.

addValidation.title: Add validation
addValidation.description: Skyguard includes built-in validation without depending on external libraries.

useMiddleware.title: Use middlewares
useMiddleware.description: Add middleware to handle cross-cutting concerns.

middlewares.label: Middlewares
